Class 8

Dhruvi Sheth 22294

21 Jan 2026

getwd()
[1] "/home/dhruvi/Desktop/Biostatistics/sessions"
lifeExpectancy <- read.csv("../GapMinder/life_expectancy_years.csv", header = TRUE, check.names = FALSE)
head(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country == "Sweden"])
plot(lifeExpectancy[,2])

plot(lifeExpectancy[,2],lifeExpectancy[,101])

plot(lifeExpectancy[,2],lifeExpectancy[,3],xlab="1800", ylab="1801")


plot(as.vector(unlist(lifeExpectancy[162,2:302])),as.vector(unlist(lifeExpectancy[3,2:302])))

plot(as.vector(unlist(lifeExpectancy[162,2:302])),
     as.vector(unlist(colnames(lifeExpectancy)[2:302]))
     ,xlab="Life expectancy in years", ylab="Year")
abline(h=2022)


years <- as.numeric(colnames(lifeExpectancy)[2:302])
le <- as.numeric(lifeExpectancy[162, 2:302])

plot(years, le,
     xlab = "Year",
     ylab = "Life expectancy (years)",
     type = "l")

abline(v = 2022)

lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="Sweden",]

na.omit(as.numeric(unlist(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="Sweden",])))->SwedenLife
na.omit(as.numeric(unlist(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="India",])))->IndiaLife

par(mfrow=c(1,2))
hist(SwedenLife)
hist(IndiaLife)


na.omit(as.numeric(unlist(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="Bangladesh",])))->BanglaLife
na.omit(as.numeric(unlist(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="Australia",])))->AussieLife
na.omit(as.numeric(unlist(lifeExpectancy[lifeExpectancy$country=="China",])))->ChinaLife

plot(c(1800:2100),SwedenLife,col="red",main="Life Expectancy in Years",pch=8,ylim=c(0,100),xlab="Years",ylab="Age")->ZX
points(c(1800:2100),IndiaLife,col="blue", pch = 0)
points(c(1800:2100),BanglaLife,col="green",  pch = 2)
points(c(1800:2100),AussieLife,col="black", pch = 5)
points(c(1800:2100),ChinaLife,col="orange", pch =1)

legend("topleft",
       legend = c("Sweden", "India", "Bangladesh", "Australia", "China"),
       col    = c("red", "blue", "green", "black", "orange"),
       pch    = c(8, 0 , 2, 5, 1),
       bty    = "n")





abline(v=2000)
abline(v=2022)

abline(h=20)



par(mfrow=c(3,3))
plot(c(1800:2100),SwedenLife,col="red",ylim=c(0,100),xlab="Years",ylab="Age")
plot(c(1800:2100),IndiaLife,col="blue",ylim=c(0,100),xlab="Years",ylab="Age")
plot(c(1800:2100),BanglaLife,col="green",ylim=c(0,100),xlab="Years",ylab="Age")
